name: Potato and Red Onion Roast
recipeIngredient: 2 large Red onions, cut into 1/2-inch bits
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Coat the uncooked potato halves and onion bits in olive oil and seasonings.
3. Spread the mixture in a deep-sided roasting pan.
4. Roast for about 40 minutes, turning the onion/potato mixture several times until all pieces are light brown.
5. Serve with a green bean salad and whole wheat bread sticks.
Total calories per serving: 471
Fat: 7 grams
